creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178477
patch

The attached patch updates the port to 7.08. It adds the LIB_DEPENDS on libp11-kit.so:security/p11-kit and USES=gssapi.

It also removes the patches for building with LibreSSL, which are not needed anymore.

The port builds fine with Poudriere on 10.3.
